caveat: provider=live: traffic is still synthetic (not real SupportMind 2.0 logs). Some requests may have failed over to the mock provider if a free-tier rate limit was hit mid-run -- see direct_baseline_provider_mix/candidate_provider_mix for the real split.
methodology: 15 synthetic support-style requests (45% drawn from a 15-prompt 'hot' FAQ-like subset, the rest from the full 500-prompt labeled dataset), replayed once against an always-large direct baseline and once through Sarathi's cache + cost-first router.
